examples: She is famed for playing dizzy blondes.
The islands are famed for their colonies of sea birds.
It is not the first time one of Google's famed self-driving cars has been involved in a crash, but it may be the first time it has caused one.
Williamsburg is famed (and scorned) for its hipster attire, worn by nearly everyone in the 'burg.
The famed Santiago de Compostela trail passes through here en route to northern Spain.
